svg.title: AI-Augmented Organizations Full Cover Composition Template
svg.desc: Full wrap SVG composition template for a 6x9 book cover. Includes back cover, spine, and front cover groups, plus image placeholder groups and text overlay groups for title, subtitle, author, back cover copy, and spine text.

g.text: A practical operating system for making AI work reliably at scale.
AI is accelerating how work gets done.
But most teams are using it in ways that make

text.tspan: Organizations are adopting AI faster than they can integrate it.
Outputs vary. Decisions drift. Teams move quickly—but without
consistency, trust, or control.
The result isn’t transformation. It’s instability.
AI-Augmented Teams introduces a practical operating system
for reliable AI-driven work.
• Diagnose your team’s AI posture
• Design workflows that produce consistent results
• Apply validation and control to AI-assisted work
• Scale AI without losing accountability
• Turn AI into a reliable system
For leaders, architects, and practitioners responsible for making
AI work in real organizations.
Dr. Darren Pulsipher is a digital transformation leader, author,
and host of the Embracing Digital Transformation podcast,
reaching over 200,000 subscribers and more than one million
monthly listeners.
He is the creator of the AI-Augmented Operating System (AAOS),
a framework for turning AI into reliable, scalable work.
AI-Augmented
Organizations
How Teams Deliver
Reliable, Defensible Results
with AI

g.text: Dr. Darren Pulsipher and Jeremy Harris
